title: Heron's formula
text: Heron's formula is given by $$A=\sqrt{s\left(s-a\right) \left(s-b\right) \left(s-c\right)}$$ where $$s=\frac{a+b+c}{2}$$ and is the semi-perimeter

title: Semi-Perimeter
text: What is the value of the semi-perimeter s?

title: Using Semi-Perimeter
text: Use the semi-perimeter along with the side lengths in Heron's formula to calculate the area.
